text: In the near future, job interviews will prioritize your AI's ability to analyze market trends and optimize workflows over your personal experience. The candidates with custom-trained AIs will negotiate higher salaries while traditional resumes gather dust.

Future job offers will hinge on your AI's project outcomes and efficiency stats, not your past roles. Those who come equipped with capable AI agents will command higher salaries, while those clinging to conventional credentials get left behind in the hiring race.

Today, set up an AI tool to analyze your ad performance metrics. Use platforms like Google Analytics or ad-specific AIs. Create a report template that auto-generates insights weekly—this saves hours, enhances client communication, and positions you as a data-driven pro.

This week, train a chatbot like OpenAI's GPT to generate data insights tailored to your projects. Input key metrics and trends, then ask it to draft summaries or business proposals. Automating this step not only saves time but also sharpens your analytical edge.

Cutting staff for AI is a misguided strategy. Investing in your team's own AI agents can boost productivity by 2-3x without increasing costs. The real winners will be those who enhance their workforce, not replace it. Future-proof your business by empowering your people.

As a bookkeeper, it's natural to feel threatened by AI. But instead of fearing it, build your own AI agent tailored to your workflows. Automate tedious tasks, analyze financial data faster, and enhance your service offerings. Make yourself indispensable, not replaceable.
